heroHeadline: Transform your industrial waste into sustainable resources
heroSubtitle: Sell, collect and trace your recyclable materials. Reduce your carbon footprint with AI-powered analytics and blockchain traceability.
stat1Label: Tons of waste exported annually in Europe
featuresHeading: Everything you need for the circular economy
featuresSubheading: Three pillars to transform your industrial waste into growth opportunities.
feature1Description: Buy and sell recyclable materials between professionals on our B2B marketplace. Smart matching connects sellers with buyers based on material type, location and volume.
feature2Description: Track every material end-to-end with Polygon blockchain. Full transparency and immutable records for your entire supply chain.
feature3Description: Calculate your carbon footprint and generate CSR reports automatically. AI-powered analytics help you meet EU regulatory requirements.
blockchainDescription: Every step of the material journey is recorded on the Polygon blockchain, creating an immutable chain of custody from source to final recycling destination.
blockchainStep1: Lot registration with unique hash and complete documentation
blockchainStep2: GPS geolocation and precise timestamping of each movement
blockchainStep3: Detailed documentation of processes and involved parties
blockchainStep4: Certification of final destination and measured impact
csrHeading: Drive your environmental impact with AI
csrDescription: Our artificial intelligence analyzes your data in real-time to generate CSR reports compliant with European standards. Visualize your carbon footprint and identify areas for improvement.
csrStep1: Automatic carbon footprint calculation per transaction
csrStep2: CSRD-compliant CSR reports and EU taxonomy
csrStep4: AI recommendations to reduce your impact

secondarySubheading: Advanced features to accelerate your environmental impact and business performance.

feature5Description: Stay compliant with EU circular economy regulations and reporting requirements effortlessly.
feature6Description: Track your environmental impact with real-time analytics and performance metrics.

studyCaseQuote: GreenEcoGenius revolutionized our recyclable materials management. Blockchain traceability and automated reporting gave us unprecedented transparency and efficiency.

ctaHeading: Ready to accelerate your circular transition?
ctaSubheading: Join hundreds of businesses already reducing waste and creating value from recyclable materials.
aboutPageSubtitle: Our mission is to make the circular economy accessible to all European businesses.
aboutMissionText: GreenEcoGenius was born from a simple observation: the circular economy cannot grow without powerful digital tools. Our mission is to provide businesses with a complete platform to sell, buy and trace their recyclable materials, while measuring and reducing their carbon footprint.
aboutVisionText: We envision a world where every piece of industrial waste finds a second life. A world where traceability is total, transparency is the norm, and every business actively contributes to the ecological transition through cutting-edge technology.
aboutClimateText: The European Union produces over 2.5 billion tons of waste per year. Less than 40% is effectively recycled. The rest ends up in landfills or is exported, contributing massively to greenhouse gas emissions. GreenEcoGenius directly tackles this challenge by connecting the actors of the circular value chain.
aboutGreentechText: Our platform combines the most advanced technologies: artificial intelligence for matching and reporting, blockchain for traceability, and real-time data analytics. We continuously invest in R&D to stay at the forefront of European GreenTech.
aboutCsrText: Corporate Social Responsibility is at the core of our DNA. We help our clients comply with the CSRD directive, generate their extra-financial reports and demonstrate their environmental commitment to their stakeholders.
aboutCarbonText: Every transaction on GreenEcoGenius comes with a precise calculation of its carbon impact. Our AI measures avoided emissions through recycling and logistics optimization, allowing our clients to concretely quantify their contribution to the fight against climate change.
faq1Answer: Le Comptoir Circulaire is a B2B marketplace where professionals can buy and sell recyclable materials. Think of it as a stock exchange for industrial waste.
faq2Answer: Every material transaction is recorded on the Polygon blockchain, creating an immutable chain of custody from source to final recycling destination.
faq3Question: Is the platform free to use?
faq3Answer: Creating an account is free. We charge a small commission on successful transactions, so you only pay when you make a deal.
faq4Question: What types of materials can I trade?
faq4Answer: Metals, plastics, paper, cardboard, glass, textiles, wood, and electronic waste. We're constantly adding new material categories.
faq5Question: How does the AI carbon calculator work?
faq5Answer: Our AI analyzes your transactions and logistics data to calculate your carbon footprint in real-time, then generates EU-compliant CSR reports automatically.
faq6Question: Can I integrate with my existing ERP?
faq6Answer: Yes, we offer REST APIs and webhooks to connect with SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics and other popular ERP systems.
faq7Question: Which countries do you operate in?
faq7Answer: We currently operate across the European Union, with plans to expand to the UK, Switzerland, and North Africa in 2026.
faq8Question: How do you verify material quality?
faq8Answer: We use a combination of seller certification, lab testing partnerships, and buyer feedback to ensure material quality standards.
faq9Answer: We are fully GDPR compliant. All data is stored in EU data centers and encrypted at rest and in transit.
